texto: We have a huge family history with Singapore because we have the duty-free shops in the airports. It's a very industrious city. It's beautiful, and Singaporeans have this wonderful desire for, and love of, luxury goods. You can see how well thought out and planned the city is with the best boutiques.
explicacao: Citação de Marie-Chantal Claire sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “We have a huge family history with Singapore because we have the duty-free shops in the airports.…” articula familia, love, history em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como history e beautiful.
